summary: Replayed ADR 0293 from the exact `0.177.109` mainline candidate by converging the private Temporal durable workflow engine on docker-runtime-lv3, provisioning its PostgreSQL history and visibility stores on postgres-lv3, wiring OpenBao-managed runtime secrets, and re-verifying the repo-managed `lv3` namespace and smoke workflow so the platform baseline advances to `0.130.72` on repository release `0.177.109`.

verification.observed: The integrated tree passed `39 passed in 2.29s` across `tests/test_temporal_runtime_role.py`, `tests/test_temporal_playbook.py`, `tests/test_temporal_postgres_role.py`, `tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py`, and `tests/test_dependency_graph.py`, and `make syntax-check-temporal` also passed after the namespace-retention retry and drift-detection fix.

verification.check: Protected release write and tracked versions
verification.observed: The integrated main candidate records repository version `0.177.109` and platform version `0.130.72`, with `RELEASE.md`, `changelog.md`, `README.md`, `versions/stack.yaml`, and `build/platform-manifest.json` all regenerated around ADR 0293.

`make converge-temporal env=production` succeeded from the exact-main `0.177.109` tree recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0293-mainline-converge-temporal-0.177.109.txt`, with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=174 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=49 rescued=0 ignored=0` and `postgres-lv3 : ok=59 changed=2 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=25 rescued=0 ignored=0`.

verification.check: Temporal runtime health and namespace state
verification.observed: Fresh runtime probes recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0293-mainline-runtime-health.txt` confirm `temporal-frontend`, `temporal-history`, `temporal-matching`, `temporal-worker`, `temporal-openbao-agent`, and `temporal-ui` are running, cluster health reports `SERVING`, and namespace `lv3` remains registered with `Config.WorkflowExecutionRetentionTtl  168h0m0s`.

Fresh headroom and smoke evidence in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0293-mainline-postgres-headroom.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-ws-0293-mainline-temporal-smoke-remote.json` show `100|71` active PostgreSQL sessions with `temporal|9`, and an on-guest workflow against `127.0.0.1:7233` completed in `371 ms` with result message `temporal-smoke:lv3`.

The integrated tree passed `release_manager.py status`, `canonical_truth.py --check`, `platform_manifest.py --check`, `validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `git diff --check`, and `./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards data-models generated-docs`. Both `make remote-validate` and `make pre-push-gate` also passed every substantive lane and failed only the expected terminal `workstream-surfaces` guard because branch `codex/ws-0293-mainline-replay` is the temporary exact-main integration branch and not a registered terminal workstream branch in `workstreams.yaml`.

notes: This receipt supersedes the branch-local ADR 0293 receipt as the canonical mainline proof for Temporal on release `0.177.109`.

The exact-main replay surfaced and fixed the namespace retention reconciliation edge case: repeated mainline replays now retry admin-tools namespace calls while Temporal settles and skip no-op retention updates when `168h` is already present.
The source commit will be updated to the final integration commit once the exact-main branch state is committed and pushed to `origin/main`.

The wrapper-gate evidence also records the only remaining branch-local non-pass before the `main` push: `workstream-surfaces` intentionally fails for the temporary integration branch `codex/ws-0293-mainline-replay` because it is not the terminal workstream branch registered in `workstreams.yaml`.
